metadata.name: Deploy Preventative Patrols Based on Crime Prediction

description: The system predicts a high likelihood of vehicle break-ins in a specific area. An operator must deploy police patrols as a deterrent.

nodes.task_description: Review the daily crime forecast, noting a high-risk prediction for 'auto theft' in the 'North Retail District'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the high-risk area and crime type.

nodes.task_description: Identify police patrol units currently on duty that are nearest to the high-risk district.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a list of available units and their locations.

nodes.task_description: Assign two patrol units to increase their presence and visibility within the predicted hot spot.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully assigns the units to a preventative patrol task.
